cross_scene_arcs.title: Mother Sister Relationship Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Da Mayor's relationship with Mother Sister changes from long-standing antagonism to her acknowledging his bravery in saving a child, and finally to an intimate domestic arrangement after he nearly dies and she cares for him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Antagonistic relationship with Mother Sister, characterized by mutual insults and conflict.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Intimate domestic relationship, with Da Mayor waking up in Mother Sister's bed after she stayed awake to care for him.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protector in Crises
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Da Mayor intervenes in dangerous situations to protect others: he saves Eddie from a car, attempts to calm a riot and shield Sal and his sons, and chases after Jade and Mother Sister during a water surge.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Recognized as a hero after saving Eddie from a speeding car.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively pursuing Jade and Mother Sister to offer help as they slide down the block.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether he reaches them in time, though later events suggest he does.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Asserting Dignity Amidst Disrespect
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Da Mayor navigates disrespect from Pino, police, and teens by seeking work for money, advising Mookie to do the right thing, refusing to identify culprits to police, and confronting mockery by demanding respect based on his past struggles.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Temporarily employed as a sidewalk sweeper but facing tension and disdain from Pino.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sits back down after confronting teens who mocked him, asserting his dignity though alcohol use continues.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing struggle with alcohol and community disrespect.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Relationship with Sal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mookie's conflicts at Sal's escalate from work clashes and mediation over the Wall of Fame to threats of firing, destruction of the pizzeria, and a final tense payment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mookie is a defiant employee with ongoing tensions with Pino and Sal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mookie destroys the pizzeria and receives his pay from Sal, ending their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether taking the money after the destruction was the right thing to do, as per Sal's advice.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sibling Conflict with Jade
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mookie's affectionate morning interaction with Jade shifts to confrontation over his work ethic and financial dependence, highlighting unresolved responsibilities.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mookie wakes Jade with playful love before leaving for work.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jade confronts Mookie about his lack of seriousness, and he remains dismissive.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jade's mention of unspecified responsibilities that Mookie should address.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Community Mediation and Escalation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mookie defends Da Mayor, mediates Buggin' Out's demand for representation, expresses brotherly love with Radio Raheem, but ultimately participates in the riot.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mookie acts as a mediator in neighborhood conflicts, defending individuals and seeking resolutions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mookie joins the violent riot, shifting from mediator to active participant.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The failure of mediation to prevent community violence and Mookie's role in the escalation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Work Disrespect and Final Settlement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mookie faces disrespect from a customer over a tip and threats of firing from Sal, culminating in him demanding and receiving his wages after the pizzeria's destruction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mookie is angry and disrespected after a poor delivery tip, threatening retaliation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mookie collects $500 from Sal, ending his employment on a transactional note.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Mookie will act on his earlier threats or if the payment resolves his grievances.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Family Authority Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal asserts his authority as father and owner against Pino's defiance over work duties and the pizzeria's location, facing resistance but reinforcing control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pino refuses to work and insults the pizzeria.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sal decides to keep the pizzeria in the neighborhood, quieting Pino but leaving underlying tension.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing family tension over the business and Pino's resentment.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rule Enforcement and Escalating Tensions
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal enforces his pizzeria's rules against customers, from refusing changes to the Wall of Fame to demanding no music, escalating confrontations with Buggin' Out and Radio Raheem.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sal refuses to add Black figures to the Wall of Fame and threatens Buggin' Out with a bat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sal smashes Radio Raheem's boombox, triggering a physical fight.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Heightened community resentment and unresolved conflicts with disruptive customers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Destruction and Racial Aftermath
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After Radio Raheem's death, Sal's pizzeria is targeted by a mob and destroyed, and he learns the attack was racially motivated.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sal is attacked by Radio Raheem, police intervene and kill Raheem, leaving Sal defenseless.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sal watches his pizzeria burn down, confronting the complete loss of his business.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Racial targeting and the irreversible destruction of Sal's livelihood.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Complex Relationship with Mookie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal's interactions with Mookie evolve from dismissing concerns about Jade to a tense final exchange over wages and morality after the riot.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sal avoids confrontation with Mookie about Jade and assigns a delivery.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sal pays Mookie and warns him not to make him dislike him, ending their work relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ambiguity in their personal and professional relationship post-destruction.
